hooks.prompt: Context is about to be compacted. Append a concise summary of this session's work to the daily log file in the project's memory directory at memory/logs/YYYY-MM-DD.md (use today's date). Format: timestamp + what was done + key outcomes. Create the file and directory if they don't exist. Keep each entry to 3-5 lines. Do NOT attempt to categorize or distill - just log what happened.
